description_long: This kiosk features a striking modern design with a predominantly black exterior accented by bold red elements. The front facade includes a large circular cutout displaying a photographic mural, and the brand 'escato' is prominently displayed in white text. The structure is composed of a series of vertical slats forming a partially open roof, with one slat highlighted in red for visual emphasis. The interior appears to have a stepped seating or display area in red, contrasting with the black surroundings. The overall form is boxy with clean, angular lines, and the kiosk is likely constructed from metal and composite panels.
description: A modern black kiosk with red accents, featuring a slatted roof, bold branding, and a circular mural on the front. The design is angular and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular mural, brand signage, and red interior seating or display area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the solid black back and the slatted roof structure with a single red slat.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the length of the slatted roof and the red accent running through it.
description_view_3: Angled top-front view showing the curvature of the slats, the mural, and the interior layout.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign and logo, placed above the entrance and integrated into the front facade, with the text 'escato' and a circular logo.
attribute_door_configuration: single open entryway at the front
attribute_roof_design: flat roof composed of parallel vertical slats, one highlighted in red, with partial openness for light and ventilation
attribute_architectural_style: modern minimalist with bold graphic elements
